items.name_cn:
onthego Small Series | CODE: M45653
2023 Early Spring Series [Exclusive Quality]
🤎Dimensions: 25 x 19 x 11.5cm
The best choice for full leather this season in the ONTHEGO Small Series
OnTheGo Small Handbag, the Tote bag draws inspiration from the classic Sac Plat handbag from 1968, creating a miniature version in Monogram Empreinte leather with a pressed Medium Bicolor Monogram pattern, capable of holding an iPad Mini and other daily essentials. Flexible handles and a removable shoulder strap enrich carrying options.

items.name_cn:
OnTheGo Small Series | CODE:M46373
2023 Early Spring Collection [Exclusive Quality]
🤎Size: 25 x 19 x 11.5cm
The best choice for this season's new arrivals in the OnTheGo Small Series.
OnTheGo Small handbag features a mix of Monogram and Monogram Reverse canvas, accented with Monogram Giant patterns. The Toron handle and jacquard shoulder strap with brand embossing create a visual contrast, while the detachable coin pouch is perfect for coins or small essentials. Combining fashion and versatility, the designer truly understands every woman.

items.name_en: Ophidia Small Handbag Monogram (with Crossbody Strap)
items.name_cn:
Ophidia Small Handbag Monogram (with Crossbody Strap)
The GG logo evolved from the Gucci diamond quilted pattern of the 1930s and has since become a traditional symbol of the brand. This small handbag from the new Ophidia collection incorporates this highly recognizable pattern. Double G accessories add charm to the overall look.
Dimensions: 15.5*25*6cm
Style No.: 735132

items.name_cn:
Optional 8mm buckle strap + 100
Bottega Veneta BV Gemelli Twin Bag (Shu Qi Style) Pre-locked, 2024 Bestseller 💕 The Gemelli consists of two crescent bags paired together, featuring the brand's signature intrecciato weaving. It comes with a detachable tubular handle, serving as a clutch, shoulder bag, or with the small crescent flipped to serve as a handle. The dual design is full of personality and charm, creating a visual impact that brings an elegant and fashionable feel. The unique structural design creates duality and volume
Multiple carrying styles to meet different needs and occasions
Style No.: 764053
Size: 42*30*12cm
